comment: Channel definitions used by the radio contact mini-game. Each night picks one as the target channel; the player must tune to it before the contact timer fills.

channels.label: Victor
channels.desc: Victor 的频道，语气平稳，会报坐标。

channels.label: Elias
channels.desc: Elias 的频道，气息短促，靠近新天线时会清晰。

channels.label: 干扰
channels.desc: 只有噪声。即使拨到这一格也算接听错误（暴露度 +0.5）。
